title: 毎日王冠の後に・猛追の代償

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa exhausts everything she's got to
beat Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So much so, in fact, that she passes out from
pushing herself beyond her limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One thing has become painfully clear to El
Condor Pasa—if there are racers like Silence
Suzuka at the Japan Cup, she doesn't stand a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hangs her head dejectedly as she decides to
give up on her goal of winning the Japan Cup in
her classic year.
